summary: Iteration 78 - Frontend testing completed for Adviser Mode updates. All 7 requested features verified: 1) Market Dashboard has historical chart with 10 timeframe buttons (1d, 1w, 2w, 1m, 3m, 6m, 1y, 3y, 5y, 10y), 2) Asset selector dropdown with 6 options (S&P 500, ASX 200, FTSE 100, Bitcoin, Gold, AUD/USD), 3) Transaction Modeler shows Save Scenario and Generate Plan buttons when transactions added, 4) Client context nav order: Overview -> Investments -> Plan -> Documents -> AI Copilot, 5) Investments section has: Net Worth, Shares & Trading, Cash & TDs, Funds, Property, 6) Plan section has: Goals, What-If Modeler (no separate Generate Plan), 7) Single AI Copilot section in client context nav.
critical_code_review_comments: MacroDashboard.jsx correctly implements TIMEFRAMES array with 10 options (1d, 1w, 2w, 1m, 3m, 6m, 1y, 3y, 5y, 10y)
MacroDashboard.jsx CHART_SYMBOLS array has 6 assets: S&P 500, ASX 200, FTSE 100, Bitcoin, Gold, AUD/USD
TransactionModeler.jsx shows Save Scenario and Generate Plan buttons only when transactions.length > 0
Layout.jsx clientContextNav order: Overview, Investments, Plan, Documents, AI Copilot
Layout.jsx Investments items: Net Worth, Shares & Trading, Cash & TDs, Funds, Property
Layout.jsx Plan items: Goals, What-If Modeler (no Generate Plan)
Backend macro_data.py has /api/macro/history endpoint for fetching historical data via yfinance
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 78 verified Adviser Mode updates: Market Dashboard has historical charts with 10 timeframes and 6 asset dropdown options. Transaction Modeler shows Save Scenario and Generate Plan buttons when transactions added. Client context nav order verified: Overview -> Investments -> Plan -> Documents -> AI Copilot. No Generate Plan in Plan section nav. Single AI Copilot section in client context.

market_dashboard_asset_selector.component: Select dropdown in Historical Performance section

client_context_nav_order.notes: Correct order verified - Investments before Plan

investments_section_items.notes: All 5 items present in correct structure

plan_section_items.notes: Generate Plan correctly removed from nav

single_ai_copilot.notes: AI Copilot appears once in client context nav (separate from AI Copilot in adviser base nav which is expected)

screenshots_taken: 10_transaction_modeler_with_transaction.png - Transaction Modeler with transaction added showing Save/Generate buttons
14_asset_selector_open.png - Asset selector dropdown showing all 6 options

mocked_apis.macro_history_fallback: MacroDashboard.jsx falls back to mock data if /api/macro/history fails (generates random data points)
mocked_apis.transaction_modeler_local: TransactionModeler.jsx scenarios saved to localStorage, Generate Plan shows toast messages
